channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw (26859 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zeroclaw-labs

📝 Repository: zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw

📄 Descrizione: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI assistant infrastructure — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀

⭐ Stelle: 26859

🍴 Forks: 3534

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: agent agentic ai openclaw

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-13T08:56:04Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-14T04:05:38Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 googleworkspace/cli (21248 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: googleworkspace

📝 Repository: googleworkspace/cli

📄 Descrizione: Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.

⭐ Stelle: 21248

🍴 Forks: 987

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills ai-agent automation cli discovery-api gemini-cli-extension google-admin google-api google-calendar google-chat google-docs google-drive google-sheets google-workspace oauth2 rust

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-02T19:46:06Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-18T04:07:56Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 anthropics/claudes-c-compiler (2476 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: anthropics

📝 Repository: anthropics/claudes-c-compiler

📄 Descrizione: Claude Opus 4.6 wrote a dependency-free C compiler in Rust, with backends targeting x86 (64- and 32-bit), ARM, and RISC-V, capable of compiling a booting Linux kernel.

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

item.title: 🦀 Ataraxy-Labs/weave (555 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Ataraxy-Labs

📝 Repository: Ataraxy-Labs/weave

📄 Descrizione: Entity-level semantic merge driver for Git. Resolves conflicts that git can't by understanding code structure via tree-sitter. 31/31 clean merges vs git's 15/31.

⭐ Stelle: 555

🍴 Forks: 14

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents conflict-resolution developer-tools git mcp merge merge-driver rust semantic-merge tree-sitter

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-06T18:15:59Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-07T03:00:22Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
